title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS106-1C-5S, 5x SFP + 1x Combo (SFP/ETH)
description: CRS106-1C-5S is very small, cheap optical switch/router with RouterOS operating system, which includes 5x SFP and 1x combo (SFP / ETH) port. Cloud Router Switch is powered by QCA8511 processor clocked at 400MHz , includes 128MB of RAM , 16MB of storage space, L5 license and maximum power consumption 11W Router/switch can be powered via a standard power adapter (10 to 28V) but also through passive PoE. The package includes a power adapter 24V / 0.8A
